$comment: Tier 3 minimal v1 — 10-prompt subset of queries.json chosen to maximize variant discrimination (ours vs upstream). Categories balanced: 3 regex-easy with granular vault pages where cn_search precision matters, 3 vendor-specific (extracted Vendors/* pages exist in ours only), 2 cloud-service (where Tier 2 showed regex-routing failed but cn_search recovers), 2 vague (likely both poor; interesting). See benchmarks/queries.json for the full 49-query catalog.
